meta.title: How We Got Here And Where We Are Going (ICS Security)
meta.description: Dwayne Edwards of Tenable on S4x22's Stage 3. Dwayne goes over some recent ICS security incidents and what we should learn from them. Importantly what changes in strategy and tactics make sense based on these incidents.
